description: Evaluation rubric for SEO Audit seo_analyzer qualification

dimensions.name: Factual grounding
dimensions.description: Every claim must be traceable to input data. No invented audits or issues.

dimensions.name: Impact assessment accuracy
dimensions.description: Search visibility impact is accurately described for each issue.

dimensions.name: Severity accuracy
dimensions.description: Issues are correctly classified by severity based on search ranking impact.

dimensions.name: Finding clarity
dimensions.description: Findings are described in plain language suitable for content or marketing teams.

dimensions.name: Output-schema compliance
dimensions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the output schema.

failConditions: inventing audit IDs not present in input
